# Superia Credit Card

## Card Benefits and Features
### Lifestyle Benefits
  * Get a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on a minimum transaction of ₹400. Max waiver: ₹500/cycle.
  * Complimentary Priority Pass Membership.


![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Reward Point Benefits
  * 3 Reward Points for every ₹200 spent.
  * 50% more Reward Points on Dining expenses at select premium restaurants.
  * Enjoy 1000 Reward Points as welcome benefit.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/superia-credit-card "View More")
![Superia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Transaction Benefits
  * Earn additional CashBack along with the card Reward Points on utility bills, mobile recharges and more via PayZapp
  * Get ₹1,000 CashBack on shopping in-app over 200+ brands via PayZapp


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/superia-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## More about the card
  1. ### Card Management and Controls
  2. ### Card Control and Redemption
  3. ### More Rewards with PayZapp
  4. ### Credit and Safety
  5. ### Fees & Renewal
  6. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  Card Management and Controls 
  * **Single Interface**  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, Fastag and Consumer Durable Loans 


  * **Spends tracking**  
Simple interface to track all your spends 


  * **Reward Points  
**View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Reward and Redemption](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Control and Redemption 
**Redemption Value:**
  * 1 Reward Point = 0.7 AirMiles
  * Save up to ₹8,000 by converting Reward Points into vouchers for domestic airlines.
  * Redeem Reward Points for AirMiles with 20+ international airlines via KrisFlyer by Singapore Airlines.
  * Use Reward Points for gifts from the exclusive rewards catalogue at the applicable redemption rate.
  * Unredeemed Reward Points will expire/ lapse after 2 years of accumulation.
  * Please [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/simple-rewards-program "/content/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/credit-cards/services/simple-rewards-program") for further details.


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  More Rewards with PayZapp 
  * Link your HDFC Bank Superia Credit Card on PayZapp 
  * Earn additional CashBack along with the card Reward Points on utility bills, mobile recharges and more.
  * Get ₹1,000 CashBack on shopping in-app over 200+ brands.
  * Securely pay without the hassle of OTPs with ‘Swipe to Pay.’


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Credit and Safety 
  * Revolving Credit is available at a nominal interest rate (Check the [fees and charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/superia-credit-card/fees-and-charges) section for more details).
  * Get Up to 50 days of interest-free credit from the date of purchase.
  * The offer is subject to the submission of the charge by the merchant.
  * Stay protected against unauthorised use when you shop anywhere with EMV Chip Card technology.


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees & Renewal 
  * Membership Renewal Fee: ₹1,000 + Applicable Taxes per year  
  

    * 1,000 Reward Points as Renewal Benefit every year
    * On annual spends of ₹75,000 or more, get ₹1,000 renewal fee waived off on your HDFC Bank Superia Credit Card.
  * An interest at the rate of 3.49% will be charged on any outstanding amount carried forward beyond the bill's due date. 
  * A 2.5% fee with a minimum of ₹500 will be applicable on all cash withdrawals from the card.


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  How to use the Superia Airline Credit?
To use an HDFC Bank **_Superia Airline Credit Card_** , simply swipe or insert the card at the payment terminal when making a purchase. You can also use it for online transactions by entering the card details. Earn reward points on every transaction, which can be redeemed for airline tickets, hotel stays, retail and online shopping, fuel purchases, and bill payments.
###  What are the benefits of a the Superia Airline Credit Card?
The Superia Airline Credit Card provides various benefits, such as reward points on every spend, the ability to convert reward points into **_airline miles_** or vouchers, complimentary Priority Pass Membership, fuel surcharge waiver, and zero liability on lost cards.
###  What is Superia Airline Credit Card?
**The _Superia Airline Credit Card is_** a premium ​Credit Card offered by HDFC Bank, specially designed for frequent travellers. It offers exclusive travel benefits, dining privileges, reward points, and much more.
###  Is the Superia Airline Credit Card free?
The Superia Airline Credit Card comes with an _**annual fee**_. However, you can get the first year's membership for free by spending ₹15,000 within the first 90 days. The renewal fee can be waived off by spending ₹75,000 in a year.
###  How to apply for the Superia Airline Credit Card?
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank Superia Airline Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other credit cards that may suit your needs. Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
